MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Nov-14-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s unopposed MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is granted.

Order and judgment are signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-10-2022 Continued To Dec-28-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted; Memorandum In Support; Declaration In Support
Off Calendar Sep-12-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEAIRNG RE: PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion is granted. The truth of all specified facts in the Requests for Admissions, Set One, propounded by plaintiff Bank of America, N.A. on defendant DENISE MELONE, by mail on May 12, 2022, are deemed admitted.

Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
